vendor_context: Anker competitor (portable power stations, solar generators, home backup power)
status: ACTIVE — Global DTC brand; dominant in portable power station / solar generator category

networks.name: Awin
networks.notes: Primary global affiliate network. Multi-market: US, CA, AU, UK, EU (DE, FR, ES, IT), ZA. Program profile at ui.awin.com/merchant-profile/59181. Full toolset expected (banners, datafeeds, deep links).

networks.name: Commission Factory
networks.notes: Listed on Commission Factory for AU and ROW markets. Contact: row.affiliate@ecoflow.com. Likely mirrors Awin rate or regional equivalent.

networks.name: Direct (EcoFlow.com)
networks.notes: EcoFlow runs a direct program at us.ecoflow.com/pages/affiliate-program. Minimum 5% per qualifying sale. 7-day cookie (shorter than Awin's 30-day). Apply direct; approval within 2-3 business days. May link out to Awin as fulfillment backend.

networks.name: CueLinks
networks.notes: Aggregator listing. Lower rate (3.15%) vs direct/Awin (5%) — standard aggregator haircut. CPC campaign type noted; commission rates described as dynamic.

affiliate_program.commission_summary: 5% minimum on all sales (direct + Awin); 3.15% via aggregators
affiliate_program.cookie_note: 30 days via Awin; only 7 days via direct program — important for affiliates to join via Awin for better attribution
affiliate_program.aov_note: Awin lists $1,500+ AOV; US site states 'over $1,000'. High-AOV category (power stations, solar generators).

company_status.financial: STABLE — Private, China-headquartered; strong global revenue, no distress signals
company_status.positioning: Market leader in portable power stations and solar generators. Positioned premium vs Jackery, direct competitor to Anker SOLIX line.

competitive_intel.commission_vs_anker: EcoFlow 5% vs Anker Amazon Associates ~1-4% — EcoFlow's direct program significantly outpaces Anker's primarily Amazon-dependent affiliate model. This is a major structural advantage for EcoFlow in affiliate recruitment.
competitive_intel.cookie_advantage: EcoFlow Awin: 30-day cookie. Anker mostly via Amazon (24-hour cookie). EcoFlow wins on attribution window significantly.
competitive_intel.aov_advantage: EcoFlow AOV $1,500+ vs Anker average order ~$30-60 (consumer electronics). At 5%, EcoFlow yields ~$75/sale avg. Anker at 3% on $50 = $1.50. EcoFlow is ~50x better affiliate payout per sale — pulls premium content publishers.
competitive_intel.affiliate_risk: LOW — Stable program, well-established on Awin, active global footprint
competitive_intel.affiliate_mindshare: EcoFlow actively recruits review sites, YouTube channels, and outdoor content creators — overlaps heavily with Anker SOLIX affiliate targets. EcoFlow is winning this content war.
competitive_intel.opportunity_for_anker: Anker SOLIX must launch or upgrade a managed affiliate program (Awin/Impact/CJ) with 5%+ commission and 30-day cookie to compete for top-tier affiliates. Current Amazon-centric model loses in every metric vs EcoFlow's Awin program.

history.event: First audit. No prior file. Confirmed Awin as primary global network at 5% commission, 30-day cookie, $1,500+ AOV. Direct program at EcoFlow.com also active (5% min, 7-day cookie). Commission Factory active for AU/ROW. CueLinks aggregator listing at 3.15%. Company stable, global expansion ongoing. EcoFlow's affiliate program structurally superior to Anker's Amazon-dependent model.
